channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: All-Stars Donvan Mitchell and Evan Mobley power East-leading Cavaliers to 142-105 blowout of Knicks
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 27 points, Evan Mobley added 21 and the Cleveland Cavaliers bullied the New York Knicks from the start Friday night, winning 142-105 in a matchup of two of the Eastern Conference's top teams.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Michigan agrees to multiyear contract extension with coach Dusty May during successful debut season
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Michigan has agreed to a multiyear contract extension for Dusty May, who this season became the first basketball coach in school history to win his first 13 home games. The school announced the move on Friday two hours before tipping off against rival Michigan State.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: State education chief says it's 'inaccurate' to say there are only two genders, in defense of trans athletes
item.description: Washington state Superintendent of Public Instruction Chris Reykdal spoke out in defense of transgender athletes in girls sports in an address Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off shatters expectations as a hockey showcase. The Milan Olympics are up next
item.description: Canada won the 4 Nations Face-Off by beating the United States for the championship in an overtime thriller capped off by Connor McDavid's memorable goal that will be on highlight reels for decades to come.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mark Williams' agent says center 'should have been a given an opportunity' to play for Lakers
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The agent for Charlotte Hornets center Mark Williams says the Los Angeles Lakers shouldn't have failed his client’s physical examination, a move that ultimately resulted in the trade being rescinded after the deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mailbag: The Big 12’s best bets for a super league (or the SEC or Big Ten), reverse-merger talk, Gould’s role and more
item.description: Which of the current Big 12 schools are best equipped to rise above the masses and gain entrance to one of the Big Two conferences in the 2030s?
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Jaguars hire Rams' James Gladstone as GM, reuniting him with coach Liam Coen
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Los Angeles Rams executive James Gladstone as their general manager Friday, reuniting him with new coach Liam Coen. Gladstone held the position of director of scouting strategy in L.A.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: After helping Canada to 4 Nations title, Avs trio will meet team in Nashville to resume playoff push
item.description: CENTENNIAL, Colo. (AP) — The Colorado Avalanche trio of Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar and Devon Toews had an easy excuse for missing Friday's practice. They needed a break after hoisting hockey's new trophy.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin's record chase, Columbus outdoor game and trade deadline await down stretch of NHL season
item.description: The NHL season resumes with 14 games on Saturday and 10 more Sunday with every team in action at least once this weekend coming out of the break for the massively successful 4 Nations Face-Off. The puck drops for the playoffs on April 19.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off final between US and Canada drew record betting action
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Canada's 3-2 overtime victory over the United States in the championship game of the 4 Nations Face-Off on Thursday night set single-game hockey betting records.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees owner Hal Steinbrenner may support a salary cap proposal tied to payroll minimum
item.description: New York Yankees owner Hal Steinbrenner may support a salary cap proposal as long as it contains a provision mandating minimum payrolls.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: College basketball: Murauskas provides X-factor to Saint Mary’s pursuit of second straight WCC regular season title
item.description: Saint Mary's will repeat as WCC outright regular-season champs for the first time in school history with a win on Saturday night at Gonzaga
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Hockey fans criticize Wayne Gretzky as he represents Team Canada at 4 Nations final vs US
item.description: Wayne Gretzky as the honorary captain for Team Canada was widely panned on Thursday night ahead of their 4 Nations Face-Off final vs. the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Germany's Paul and Norway's Ventura part of international leaderboard in Mexico Open
item.description: VALLARTA, Mexico (AP) — Six of the seven PGA Tour events this year had international winners, and the Mexico Open kept up with trend Thursday when Jeremy Paul of Germany, Kris Ventura of Norway and Harry Hall of England shared the lead at 7-under 64.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Robot umpires are getting their first MLB test during spring training
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A computerized system that calls balls and strikes is being tested during Major League Baseball spring training exhibition games starting Thursday after four years of experiments in the minor leagues.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: RSL settles for scoreless draw in Champions Cup opener
item.description: SAN JOSE, Costa Rica (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake kicked off its 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a scoreless draw against reigning Costa Rican champions CS Herediano in RSL's first Champions Cup game since 2016. "I thought it was a really hard fought game," said RSL head coach Pablo Mastroeni.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9

item.title: Grand Junction River Hawks make major hire as they begin to build roster
item.description: The start of Grand Junction River Hawks season on Labor Day Weekend 2025 is less than 6 months away. It's time to put together a roster.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Eagles player declines actor’s offer to pay Super Bowl fine
item.description: Actor and Eagles fan Rob McElhenny, best known for co-creating and starring in FXX’s “It’s Always Sunny in Philadelphia,” had recently offered to foot the bill for a fine incurred by Eagles player Jalyx Hunt during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ludvig Aberg rallies down the stretch at Torrey Pines to win the Genesis Invitational
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg never felt worse leaving a golf course than three weeks ago at Torrey Pines when he shared the 36-hole lead only to get violently ill from a stomach ailment and stagger to the finish with a 79.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Liverpool continues Premier League title charge and Man United's season keeps getting worse
item.description: Liverpool continued its charge toward the Premier League title on Sunday with a 2-1 win against Wolverhampton. For Manchester United, it just keeps getting worse after a 1-0 loss at Tottenham.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump to attend NASCAR's Daytona 500 for the second time as president
item.description: Donald Trump is planning to attend Sunday's Daytona 500 for the second time as president and help further burnish his image as a sports fan.
item.dc:creator: Darlene Superville, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes stun #17 Kansas, 74-67
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 24 points and became Utah's career leader in made 3-pointers as the Utes beat No. 17 Kansas 74-67 on Saturday night. Madsen's fifth and final 3-pointer of the game with 1:58 to play gave him the Utah career record of 288 made 3s.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani throws 1st BP of spring training, taking a step toward possibly pitching
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani threw his first bullpen of spring training on Saturday, taking a step toward possibly pitching for the first time since 2023.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: DAYTONA, Fla. (WGHP) — The field of 41 racers has officially been set for Sunday's Daytona 500. This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway in Daytona Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WGN 9

item.title: Central girls & Grand Junction boys secure wins in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — In a thrilling matchup that went to overtime, the Central Warriors edged out Grand Junction 55-51, securing their sixth win of the season. Tied at 44 heading into the extra period, Bianca Berens opened with a mid-range jumper to give Central the lead.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
